title: Pediatric->AYA transition module (survivorship care plan, exposure summary, transition to adult care)
context: The pediatric-to-AYA transition module for ewing-survivorship-late-effects, explaining survivorship care plans and treatment-exposure summaries at the pediatric-to-adult handoff. HIGH risk-tier patient-facing and education-only with the 'Informational, not medical advice - consult your care team' label; every assertion sourced and the fact-vs-expression copyright firewall (synthesize facts and cite; never reproduce protected guideline text/tables/figures) upheld. Publish requires that no patient-facing page ships without BOTH a credentialed pediatric/AYA oncologist AND a patient-advocate version-scoped sign-off (neither alone suffices).
objective: Draft the pediatric->AYA transition module covering survivorship care plans, exposure summaries, and the handoff to adult care, fully sourced and dual-signed.
acceptanceCriteria: Explains what a survivorship care plan and a treatment-exposure summary are and why they matter at the pediatric->adult handoff; education-only; routes to the care team/survivorship clinic
Fully sourced; AYA-appropriate voice; caregiver framing included; no-advice label; grade 6-8; WCAG 2.2 AA
Passes all automated gates and carries both oncologist + advocate version-scoped sign-offs
